heading: Applicability
label: 13642 Applicability
text: Except as otherwise provided in subtitles B through F of this title and the amendments made by such subtitles, such subtitles and the amendments made by such subtitles shall apply upon the expiration of the 6-month period beginning on .October 28, 1992
notes: References in TextSubtitles B through F of this title, referred to in text, mean subtitles B to F of title VI of , , , which enacted this chapter, amended sections 1437a, 1437c to 1437g, 1437, 1437, 1438, 8011, 8013, and 12705 of this title and , Banks and Banking, and enacted provisions set out as notes under and .Pub.
